title: Mini Minecraft
description: To this day, a little known fact about me is my childhood addiction to a popular world-building PC game called Minecraft. Early every Saturday morning, I'd tiptoe downstairs, power on the family PC, and lose myself in a simple life where exploration, creation, and monster-extermination made the world go round (literally).

In that sense, now a university student studying computer graphics & video game programming, I was indubitably excited to create Mini Minecraft: a C++, OpenGL, and GLSL-based reimagination of the very game I grew up on.
